name: Hit-to-Lead ADMET Optimization
description: Hit-to-lead progression: confirm and triage hits, assess potency, profile ADMET, and iteratively modify structure to satisfy drug-likeness, improve solubility and metabolic stability, and clear toxicity flags before nominating a lead series.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Screening hits"]
    N2["Confirm + triage hits"]
    N3["Assess potency"]
    N4["ADMET profiling"]
    N5{"Drug-likeness OK?"}
    N6["Modify structure"]
    N7["Solubility / stability"]
    N8{"Toxicity flags?"}
    N9["Redesign / deprioritize"]
    N10["Lead series nominated"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 -->|no| N6
    N6 -->|re-test| N3
    N5 -->|yes| N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|yes| N9
    N9 -->|iterate| N3
    N8 -->|clean| N10

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Experimental and computational approaches to estimate solubility and permeability (Rule of Five)
sources.authors: Lipinski, C. A.; Lombardo, F.; Dominy, B. W.; Feeney, P. J.

sources.title: Principles of early drug discovery
sources.authors: Hughes, J. P.; Rees, S.; Kalindjian, S. B.; Philpott, K. L.

sources.title: The influence of lead discovery strategies on the properties of drug candidates
sources.authors: Keserű, G. M.; Makara, G. M.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.
